creator: skozlov@FreeBSD.org
text:
Updated Django to 1.5.2, which fixes some bugs and security issues in 1.5.1.

Release notes:
https://docs.djangoproject.com/en/1.5/releases/1.5.2/

Patch changes PORTVERSION, distinfo and plist only.
Tested with Port Tools 0.99_8.

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
